title: SEC’s innovation exemption for tokenized stocks to come as early as this week: Bloomberg
snippet: The SEC has approved several entities to move forward with tokenized stock initiatives, including the NYSE and Nasdaq.

title: Revolut unveils first physical crypto card as industry-wide card usage grows
snippet: The card will be usable anywhere Visa and Mastercard are accepted, and will first roll out firm in the UK and EEA.

title: Standard Chartered to acquire Zodia Custody’s custody business
snippet: Standard Chartered (SC) today announced that its non-binding offer to acquire Zodia Custody (ZC), a digital asset custodian backed by SC Ventures (SCV), has been accepted by the shareholders and noteholders of Zodia Custody.

title: Bank of England, FCA Set Out ‘Shared Vision’ for Tokenization
snippet: The UK’s central bank and financial regulator have launched a joint Call for Input as tokenization moves from “pilots to production.”

title: UK proposes near-24/7 settlement to prepare markets for tokenization
snippet: The FCA and Bank of England are seeking feedback on new tokenization guidance and plans to extend operating hours for the UK’s core payment and settlement infrastructure toward near-24/7 availability.

title: SEC to make ‘innovation exemption’ for tokenized stock trading: Report
snippet: Several SEC officials reportedly didn’t support the decision, while tokenization platform Securitize flagged risks with enabling third-party platforms to issue tokenized stocks.

title: RBA moves from experimentation to commercial realisation of tokenized asset markets

title: Morning Minute: SEC Reverses Course on Tokenized Stocks, HYPE Soars
snippet: HYPE soared as the SEC opened the door to third-party tokenized stocks. Strategy bought another $2B in BTC, and price still went lower.

title: Standard Chartered to absorb Zodia Custody’s crypto business into its own operations: Bloomberg
snippet: Standard Chartered has agreed to acquire Zodia Custody's crypto business to fold into its own digital asset operations, per Bloomberg.

title: SEC Developing Framework to Permit Tokenized Stocks
snippet: The Trump administration is reportedly readying a plan for trading digital versions of securities. title: Minnesota legalizes crypto custody services for banks, credit unions
snippet: Minnesota-based banking institutions and credit unions will be authorized to provide digital asset custody services in a nonfiduciary capacity as of Aug. 1.

title: Tether invests in remittance fintech LemFi to expand USDT settlement across Africa and Asia
snippet: Founded in 2021, LemFi says it has over 1 million customers and is backed by Y-Combinator, with $85 million raised.

title: Standard Chartered to absorb Zodia Custody’s core business, spin out Zodia Solutions
snippet: Standard Chartered will absorb Zodia Custody’s regulated crypto business and spin out Zodia Solutions, as big banks move to own core digital asset custody in-house.
